Title: Sleepy Hollow
Writer: Phillip Iscove, Alex Kurtzman, Roberto Orci
Actors: Tom Mison, Lyndie Greenwood, Nicole Beharie
Plot: Ichabod Crane is resurrected and pulled two and a half centuries through time to unravel a mystery that dates all the way back to the founding fathers.
Language: Middle English, English, German, Greek, Latin
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 34 nominations total
